markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Ella's discovery call with George on GrowthX's operational challenges.](https://fathom.video/share/wGC-b9cfmJoi5mqNyu_f_FYZrGAyy3ez?tab=summary&timestamp=555.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Strategy Sprints are a success but have operational gaps.** The 8-week sprints de-risk engagements by securing upfront alignment and access, but their execution lacks rigor, causing churn (e.g., LightSource) and failed conversions (e.g., Bubble).](https://fathom.video/share/wGC-b9cfmJoi5mqNyu_f_FYZrGAyy3ez?tab=summary&timestamp=1658.0)
  - [**Two core pains hinder scalability:** 1) Siloed knowledge prevents delivery teams from using engineering's efficiency tools (e.g., AI visibility workflows). 2) Leadership meetings are activity-based reports, not goal-driven strategy sessions.](https://fathom.video/share/wGC-b9cfmJoi5mqNyu_f_FYZrGAyy3ez?tab=summary&timestamp=2314.0)
  - [**A new manual system tracks account health,** but its manual nature and lack of integration with the sprint process limit its effectiveness in proactively flagging risks.](https://fathom.video/share/wGC-b9cfmJoi5mqNyu_f_FYZrGAyy3ez?tab=summary&timestamp=1982.0)
  - [**George's time is split between fire-fighting and strategic projects.** His ideal role is focused on scalable initiatives, but he's pulled into operational gaps like running Strategy Sprint kickoffs and managing custom accounts.](https://fathom.video/share/wGC-b9cfmJoi5mqNyu_f_FYZrGAyy3ez?tab=summary&timestamp=2970.0)

## Topics

### The Problem: Scaling Pains

  - [**Context:** GrowthX's rapid growth to 55 delivery staff has outpaced its operational model, creating bottlenecks and inefficiencies.](https://fathom.video/share/wGC-b9cfmJoi5mqNyu_f_FYZrGAyy3ez?tab=summary&timestamp=555.0)
  - [**Ella's Role:** Build a scalable operating model for the full customer journey (sales → delivery → retention) to support the upcoming product launches and the goal of scaling beyond 100 clients.](https://fathom.video/share/wGC-b9cfmJoi5mqNyu_f_FYZrGAyy3ez?tab=summary&timestamp=3133.0)

### The Solution: Strategy Sprints

  - [**Purpose:** A mandatory 8-week sprint to de-risk engagements and improve downstream execution by securing upfront alignment and access.](https://fathom.video/share/wGC-b9cfmJoi5mqNyu_f_FYZrGAyy3ez?tab=summary&timestamp=807.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/wGC-b9cfmJoi5mqNyu_f_FYZrGAyy3ez?tab=summary&timestamp=991.0)
      - [**ICP Matrix:** A scoreable matrix qualifies clients on factors like trust, long-term buy-in, and a streamlined approval process.](https://fathom.video/share/wGC-b9cfmJoi5mqNyu_f_FYZrGAyy3ez?tab=summary&timestamp=991.0)
      - [**Sales Handoff:** A detailed doc transfers context from sales to the sprint team.](https://fathom.video/share/wGC-b9cfmJoi5mqNyu_f_FYZrGAyy3ez?tab=summary&timestamp=1343.0)
      - [**Kickoff Call:** A 1-hour deep dive with key stakeholders to define goals and identify knowledge gaps.](https://fathom.video/share/wGC-b9cfmJoi5mqNyu_f_FYZrGAyy3ez?tab=summary&timestamp=1387.0)
  - [**Ownership:** Andy and Ada now manage the sprint process, which includes daily standups and Linear tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/wGC-b9cfmJoi5mqNyu_f_FYZrGAyy3ez?tab=summary&timestamp=1826.0)

### The Gaps: Where Sprints Fail

  - [**Execution Failures:**](https://fathom.video/share/wGC-b9cfmJoi5mqNyu_f_FYZrGAyy3ez?tab=summary&timestamp=1658.0)
      - [**LightSource (Churned):** Churned due to a content backlog stuck in legal review, blocking publication and preventing signals of success.](https://fathom.video/share/wGC-b9cfmJoi5mqNyu_f_FYZrGAyy3ez?tab=summary&timestamp=1658.0)
      - [**Bubble (Failed Conversion):** Failed to convert after the sprint because a promised technical SEO audit was not delivered.](https://fathom.video/share/wGC-b9cfmJoi5mqNyu_f_FYZrGAyy3ez?tab=summary&timestamp=1732.0)
  - [**Root Cause:** The sprint process lacks operational rigor to track specific SoW milestones and proactively flag risks.](https://fathom.video/share/wGC-b9cfmJoi5mqNyu_f_FYZrGAyy3ez?tab=summary&timestamp=1826.0)

### The New System: Account Health Tracking

  - [**Purpose:** A new system to track account health and director activity, built by George and Bridget.](https://fathom.video/share/wGC-b9cfmJoi5mqNyu_f_FYZrGAyy3ez?tab=summary&timestamp=1982.0)
  - [**Components:**](https://fathom.video/share/wGC-b9cfmJoi5mqNyu_f_FYZrGAyy3ez?tab=summary&timestamp=1982.0)
      - [**Notion Dashboard:** Directors score accounts weekly (out of 25) and flag health status.](https://fathom.video/share/wGC-b9cfmJoi5mqNyu_f_FYZrGAyy3ez?tab=summary&timestamp=2052.0)
      - [**Linear Tickets:** All director work is formalized into tickets tied to accounts and specific health metrics.](https://fathom.video/share/wGC-b9cfmJoi5mqNyu_f_FYZrGAyy3ez?tab=summary&timestamp=1990.0)
  - [**Limitation:** The system is manual and not integrated with the Strategy Sprint process, limiting its ability to proactively flag issues early in the engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/wGC-b9cfmJoi5mqNyu_f_FYZrGAyy3ez?tab=summary&timestamp=1982.0)

### The Pain Points: Systemic Issues

  - [**1. Context Sharing:** Siloed knowledge prevents delivery teams from using efficiency tools built by engineering.](https://fathom.video/share/wGC-b9cfmJoi5mqNyu_f_FYZrGAyy3ez?tab=summary&timestamp=2343.0)
      - [**Example:** Delivery teams were manually creating AI visibility prompts, unaware of a pre-built workflow from Daniel (CTO) that could automate the task.](https://fathom.video/share/wGC-b9cfmJoi5mqNyu_f_FYZrGAyy3ez?tab=summary&timestamp=2422.0)
  - [**2. Leadership Focus:** Leadership meetings are activity-based reports, not goal-driven strategy sessions.](https://fathom.video/share/wGC-b9cfmJoi5mqNyu_f_FYZrGAyy3ez?tab=summary&timestamp=2701.0)
      - [**Impact:** This creates a top-down prioritization issue that George must manually correct.](https://fathom.video/share/wGC-b9cfmJoi5mqNyu_f_FYZrGAyy3ez?tab=summary&timestamp=2701.0)

### George's Ideal Role

  - [**Preference:** Strategic, project-based work (e.g., fixing kickoffs, developing a scalable platform model) over repetitive process management.](https://fathom.video/share/wGC-b9cfmJoi5mqNyu_f_FYZrGAyy3ez?tab=summary&timestamp=2970.0)
  - [**Current Time Allocation:**](https://fathom.video/share/wGC-b9cfmJoi5mqNyu_f_FYZrGAyy3ez?tab=summary&timestamp=3074.0)
      - [**10%:** Managing the custom Lovable account.](https://fathom.video/share/wGC-b9cfmJoi5mqNyu_f_FYZrGAyy3ez?tab=summary&timestamp=3087.0)
      - [**\~50%:** Strategic projects (e.g., building the account health system).](https://fathom.video/share/wGC-b9cfmJoi5mqNyu_f_FYZrGAyy3ez?tab=summary&timestamp=3087.0)
      - [**\~40%:** CoS duties (e.g., managing EAs, prioritizing Marcel's requests).](https://fathom.video/share/wGC-b9cfmJoi5mqNyu_f_FYZrGAyy3ez?tab=summary&timestamp=3087.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Ella:**](https://fathom.video/share/wGC-b9cfmJoi5mqNyu_f_FYZrGAyy3ez?tab=summary&timestamp=3133.0)
      - [Continue interviewing leadership to form hypotheses on operational gaps.](https://fathom.video/share/wGC-b9cfmJoi5mqNyu_f_FYZrGAyy3ez?tab=summary&timestamp=3133.0)
      - [Get system access (Notion, Linear) to review the new account health dashboard.](https://fathom.video/share/wGC-b9cfmJoi5mqNyu_f_FYZrGAyy3ez?tab=summary&timestamp=2052.0)
      - [Partner with Bridget to interview delivery team members.](https://fathom.video/share/wGC-b9cfmJoi5mqNyu_f_FYZrGAyy3ez?tab=summary&timestamp=3133.0)
      - [Develop a scalable operating model to support the upcoming product launches.](https://fathom.video/share/wGC-b9cfmJoi5mqNyu_f_FYZrGAyy3ez?tab=summary&timestamp=3133.0)
  - [**George:**](https://fathom.video/share/wGC-b9cfmJoi5mqNyu_f_FYZrGAyy3ez?tab=summary&timestamp=2101.0)
      - [Share links to the account health dashboard and director sprint board.](https://fathom.video/share/wGC-b9cfmJoi5mqNyu_f_FYZrGAyy3ez?tab=summary&timestamp=2101.0)
